entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud. Can I get access to my CDS view via OData4 interface - "sap/opu/odata4/s
entry.content:
Remember, there is no such thing as "on-premise" or "OnPremise" in real English.
"Premise" is concept.
"Premises" is a location.

"https://collectivecontent.agency/2018/04/19/should-i-say-on-premise-or-on-premises-it/"

entry.title: Re: My Inbox - Expert View - Task Title URL?

Hi @mikegoalie ,
if you maintain the wf-step via transaktion SWFVISU you can remove the link from the task title.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/my-inbox-open-task-swfvisu-configuration/ba-p/13292774

entry.title: Power Up Your Networking and Knowledge in the Utilities and Energy Industry with SAP Community
entry.content:
Dear Utilities and Oil, Gas, and Energy Enthusiasts and Professionals. 

Are you looking to stay ahead of the latest trends and developments in the utilities and energy industry? Are you keen on networking with other professionals, gaining insights from industry experts, and expanding your knowledge base? If your answer is yes, then belonging to the SAP for Utilities and Oil, Gas, and Energy Community is a MUST for you!

There are several ways to engage with us:

The SAP Community is a thriving platform for professionals in the utilities and energy sector to come together, share ideas, ask questions, and stay updated on the latest innovations and best practices. Being active in the SAP Community will provide you access to a wealth of resources and opportunities to connect with like-minded individuals.

Join the SAP Utilities Group 

 

 

Join the SAP Oil, Gas, and Energy Group

 

 

By signing up for the newsletter, you will have access to valuable resources, including articles, blogs, webinars, whitepapers that cover a wide range of topics relevant to the utilities and energy industry. Whether you're interested in learning about the latest technologies, industry trends, or best practices, you'll find a wealth of information to fuel your professional growth.

Sign up for the Utilities Newsletter

 

 

Sign up for the Oil, Gas, and Energy Newsletter

 

 

Attending our events, particularly in-person, will greatly enhance your networking opportunities. In-person events offer a fantastic platform to connect with industry peers, thought leaders, and experts. By actively engaging in the community, you'll have the opportunity to participate in meaningful discussions, share ideas, contribute to the knowledge base, and establish valuable connections that can advance your career and business. 

Save the date for the SAP for Energy and Utilities Conference in Rotterdam from April 8-10, 2025 

Stay updated: In a fast-paced industry like utilities and energy, staying abreast of the latest developments is crucial. The SAP for Energy and Utilities Community channels help you stay updated on the latest news, product updates, and industry trends, ensuring that you're always ahead of the curve.

So, what are you waiting for? Join the SAP Community, sign up for the newsletter, and start enjoying the benefits of being an active participant in this vibrant community. Whether you're a customer, partner, or just interested in the utilities and energy sector for any reason, there's something for everyone in the SAP Community.

Watch the video 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

We can't wait to connect with you!

entry.title: Re: Managing Legacy and SAP Supplier IDs During S4HC Data...

entry.title: Re: Inbound delivery without putaway in sap public cloud
entry.content:
Dear,

thank you for this question. For Goods Receipt automation you could use the "Schedule Goods Receipt for Inbound Deliveries" app. Regarding the second point of your question (without proceeding with the put-away), please take a look on the following note: https://me.sap.com/notes/0003401898

Hope this helps. Thank you!

Best regards,

Darius Nowak

SAP SE

Cloud ERP Product Management - Logistics

entry.title: Re: Business Process Model Connector (BPMC) Sync Solman 7.2 >>Signavio
entry.content:
Dear zabdain,

The Solman Connector (Business Process Model Connector) enables the import of initial folder structures, processes, and process step references/originals to Signavio. Attributes for processes and process step references/originals can also be mapped (see SAP help: https://help.sap.com/docs/signavio-process-transformation-suite/business-process-model-connector/mapping-attributes?locale=en-US). However, there are limitations regarding the types of fields supported for mapping. An upcoming update, expected in its initial version by the end of 2024 (see external Roadmap: https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=F71E8E8587BC1EEE9FB5474ED9D6152D&q=business%2520process%2520model%2520connector&range=CURRENT-LAST#;INNO=45AB3E795FB61EEF91BB8F400491B94F), will allow synchronization of executables, with further enhancements anticipated in 2025 (not yet visible on public roadmap). As of now, this feature is not available. All other attachments, such as documents, test steps, etc., remain exclusively managed in SolMan and are not transferred to Signavio.

BR Nick

entry.title: Re: How to increase length of domain 'SETVAL' from char24->char40?

Shivani.

please try this : SCMS_STRING_TO_XSTRING

entry.title: Re: how to read RSTXT-TXLINE field
entry.content: Run the SQL trace (ST05) to know the column values used to access the tables STXH and STXL (those which are read by READ_TEXT).

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

Thank you for providing this digital skills initiative for self-learners. It opens the door for non-SAP consultants to have the opportunity to qualify for an SAP certificate. I am self-learning through an SAP online learning course and plan to take the exam after completing the course to upskill myself with an SAP certificate.

Thanks again!
Frank

entry.title: Search is giving an error in App "Clear Production Supply Area"
entry.content:
Production order is created, followed by Stage task creation and picking. After picking, need to send back one of the component to Actual bin using app "Clear Production Supply Area", where the selection ends with the following error: "No production supply area found for warehouse XXXX".

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Search is giving an error in App "Clear Production Su...
entry.content:
The issue in this case is that you're looking for a PSA, but what you're actually searching for is a bin.

For example: Selection criteria for PSA is set as 'PSA1'. However, this is the GM bin in the Production Material Request (PMR). The usual naming convention of the PSA looks something like this: "PSA-BS-001 /XXXX". You can check the PSA in transaction code /SCWM/PMR on item tab.

This discrepancy is what's causing the error message "No production supply area found for warehouse XXXX".

entry.title: Re: Undeploy or Delete OPC UA Server (shop floor system)
entry.content:
Hi,

Thanks @ksinghal for your input

After clicking "delete" on the OPC UA Server, its status changes to "Marked For Deletion."

However, when I try to delete the previous group used for deployment in "Deploy Shop Floor Elements," I receive an error message: "The deployment group could not be deleted. Some or all shop floor elements have already been deployed." Regarding the OPC UA Server with the status "Marked for Deletion," is it possible to remove it completely from the screen?

entry.title: Re: Intelligent Invoice Scanning
entry.content:
Hi Simon,

may I ask you to report an incident, with a clear cut reproducible example in test-tenant. We will then analyse and respond.

Thanks a lot,

Stefan

entry.title: Re: how to add a field in ALV of transaction IW47
entry.content:
There are two solutions to add a custom field to IW47 ALV:

  1. EITHER create an append on DDIC structure RIHAFVR, in which you add the field (preferred solution)
  2. OR enhance the global structure/internal table OBJECT_TAB in RIAFRU20 via the Enhancement Framework + enhance the field catalog (global variable G_FIELDCAT_TAB in RIAFRU20) via CMOD IWOC0004 exit_saplirep1_001 (include ZXCSVU09), but this is not recommended by SAP (*)

Of course, you need to fill the new field of the internal table, do that wherever you want via the Enhancement Framework.

After that, empty the ALV field catalog buffer (run the program BALVBUFDEL) because IW47/RIAFRU20 uses the ALV buffer.

NB concerning the internal details of RIAUFR20. It calls the FM REUSE_ALV_FIELDCATALOG_MERGE with the parameter I_INTERNAL_TABNAME="OBJECT_TAB" to determine the initial field catalog, this FM considers all custom fields appended to the included structures (RIHAFVR) but not the fields appended by the Enhancement Framework, hence you need to do an enhancement to update the field catalog for these fields.

(*) NB the documentation of exit_saplirep1_001 says: "You can modify the field attributes in the field catalog IT_FIELDCAT using this customer exit. However, we must point out that the table as a whole should not be modified, that is, you should neither add nor delete rows."

NB: to consider the latest program modifications, you must restart the program (/NIW47 or /NSE38 RIAFRU20).

entry.title: Re: Error in creation material master MM01
entry.content:
Hello @DominikTylczyn 

Thank you for the response. There is no short dump match in ST22 but in SM13 "error in CKMS_POST_PERIOD_DELTA" is reflecting. Please guide me how to resolve this.

entry.title: Where can I learn configuring the Python machine learning client for SAP HANA (hana-ml)?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Developing Regression Models with the Python Machine Learning Client for SAP HANA learning journey.

Overview
In this enablement you will apply the machine learning workflow using the Python machine learning client for SAP HANA, also known as hana-ml. You will look at the steps from feature extraction to model evaluation, using the California housing dataset as scenario.

Learning objectives

  • Configuring the Python machine learning client for SAP HANA (hana-ml) and connecting to SAP HANA Cloud
  • Accessing and visually exploring SAP HANA data using HANA dataframes via Python
  • Training a regression model for the California housing dataset using  hana-ml Predictive Analysis Library (PAL) functions
  • Performing Model Evaluation to show the model accuracy obtained

Prerequisites

  • Basic Structured Query Language (SQL) knowledge is highly desirable.
  • If you need some foundational information, you can also refer to: 
    Developing AI Models with the Python Machine Learning Client for SAP HANA

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: SAP digital intiative
entry.content: I am a recent Software Engineering graduate, eager to expand my expertise in SAP, with a particular focus on becoming an SAP Certified Associate - Data Analyst in SAP Analytics Cloud. Having successfully completed the learning journeys for "Designing Stories in SAP Analytics Cloud" and "Leveraging SAP Analytics Cloud Functionality for Enterprise Planning," I am now seeking to further enhance my skills and knowledge. As a gesture of support for this next step, I kindly request a voucher to assist with the certification process. This would not only alleviate financial constraints but also motivate me to continue advancing in this field. I am confident that this will enable me to contribute meaningfully to the SAP community. Thank you for considering my request, and I look forward to your positive response. Sincerely,

entry.title: Assigning Dimension Members Planning Model
entry.content:
Hello,

After data foundation table was populated with fact data, new dimension was added to the planning model. I had to choose default value for new dimension, and I chose Unassigned. However, in regard to fact data I want to assign two different values for this dimension and use it as an indicator later on. Is there a way to change dimension values through data action or some other planning concept? 

Kind regards,

Marija

Regards Carsten Wyrowski

entry.title: Re: Display dunning history - display dunning letter without watermark
entry.content:
Hi Eli,

That is the standard behavior in the Display Dunning History app. To see it without the watermark, use the Create Dunning Notices app. In the app, go to Menu -> Goto -> Output, then use the Display Document button. 

Kind regards,

Martin

entry.title: Re: Increase decimals in currency
entry.content:
Hi @Dario_Bustillos,

SAP provides the currency content based on ISO Standard 4217, hence the decimal adjustment is not supported as it could trigger inconsistencies. No SCCUI available for this scenario.

For more detailed information: SAP Note 3492731 - FAQ: Currency Translation in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud

Hope this helps.

Arturo Montes de Oca

entry.title: Re: How to increase length of domain 'SETVAL' from char24->char40?
entry.content:
Problem is for an ECC version as S/4 HANA handles the 40 characters with only some restrictions

In the OP system, it seems that (S_ALR_87013047 with matnr more than 18 digits.)

  • Data Element/Domain such as KKB_MATNR were converted from 18 to 40 by DIMP AddOns and then by upgrade to DIMP ERP 2005.
  • The Data Elements such as SETVALMIN and SETVALMAX and domain SETVAL are related to FI-SL set of data and used by report writer (here on KKBE) and report to report interface and truncate selections to 24 characters

@shiz0frenik do you confirm?

entry.title: Re: SAP data transfer over the internet
entry.content:
My personal favorite way is to use the omnipresent SAPEVT in ECC systems passing the filename as a parameter.  The file is either a bat file in Windows or a Bash script in Unix/Linux.

 

We also did the below, because some customers refuse to use the omnipresent SAPEVT.

Define an external command via SM69
* In the Command ('Kommando') section:
* Enter the command ('Kommandoname'), e.g., 'ZZ_SFTP2XFER_FILE'
* Enter the operating system ('Betriebssystem'), e.g., 'UNIX'
*
* In the Definition section:
* Enter an operating system command ('Betriebssystem-Kommando').
* Here you can enter the name of the OS command shell that you write,
* e.g., 'SAP_output_file2Xfer_script' that encrypts/sends/deletes
* the file to send from SAP.  This could be via an SFTP or REST process.

Then call the command via FM "CALL FUNCTION 'SXPG_COMMAND_EXECUTE' ".

entry.title: SAP MDK - I can't delete a related entity
entry.content:
Hello community, thanks for your help. I have a problem. When I try to delete an entity called "NOTICIA" I get this message: "Error: [-10125] Cannot delete this entity instance because another entity instance is dependent on it."

NOTICIA, AREA, PERSONA entities definitions:

entity NOTICIA : cuid, AUDITORIA {
    TITULO : String100;
    CUERPO : String5000;
    EMPRESA: Association to one EMPRESA;
    AREA : Association to one AREA;
    AUTOR : Association to one PERSONA;
    NOTICIAPERSONALIKES: Composition of many NOTICIAPERSONALIKE on NOTICIAPERSONALIKES.NOTICIA = $self;
    NOTICIAMEDIA: Association to one NOTICIAMEDIA;
}

entity AREA : cuid, AUDITORIA, ACTIVO {
    EMPRESA : Association to one EMPRESA;
    DESCRIPCION : String100;
    DESCRIPCIONCONCATENADA : String5000;
    AREANIVEL : Association to one AREANIVEL;
    CODIGOSAP : String;
    ACTIVOSAP : Boolean;
    EQUIPOS : Association to many EQUIPO on EQUIPOS.AREA = $self;
    AREAPADRE: Association to one AREA;
    AREASHIJAS : Association to many AREA ON AREASHIJAS.AREAPADRE = $self;
}

entity PERSONA : cuid, AUDITORIA, ACTIVO {
    NOMBRE : String;
    APELLIDO : String;
    NRODOCUMENTO : String;
    EQUIPO : Association to one EQUIPO;
}

This error only appears when I relate NOTICIA to AREA or PERSONA, if I don't do this I can delete the entity without problems. How can I solve this? I don't want this kind of restriction. What is the notation I need in CDS? I don't want to use compositions.

entry.title: SAP MDK - How can I query records within a rule?
entry.content: Hello community, thanks for the help. I want to know if it is possible within a javascript rule to make a query to my service to store records in a variable. Until now I always make these queries from the UI and using clientAPI.binding I inspect the results obtained, but there are situations in which I need to make specific queries to other endpoints of my cap service without depending on a view. Is this possible? Could you provide me with a practical example? Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Error in creation material master MM01
entry.content:
Updates requests pending on transaction SM13 - How to check what happened with those pending updates? 

  • Which exact error was raised by FM CKMS_POST_PERIOD_DELTA, from SM13 : duplicates, lock, invalid values, etc.
    (you can display received parameters' values)

entry.title: Microsoft Office Integration + Scheduling Analysis for Office Reports in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Microsoft Office integration with SAP Analytics Cloud is a hot topic, especially now that it is possible to schedule and broadcast Analysis for Office reports in SAP Analytics Cloud.

SAP Product Manager Jeanne Bigonnet joined the APOS team recently in a webinar to provide an update on SAP Analytics Cloud Microsoft Office integration. The APOS team detailed new scheduling and broadcasting capabilities in their Publisher for Cloud solution.

You can watch this webinar on demand and download the slide deck here.

Agenda

Jeanne started by summarizing SAP’s MS integration offerings, including:

  • SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Excel, which is delivered through the Microsoft Store and is built on an entirely different, Cloud-based code base from the older Analysis for Office offerings
  • SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office, also known as AfO, a mature product which continues to be an important add-in for data sources such as SAP BW, HANA, BPC, S/4 and Group Reporting

Jeanne told us that AfO has a user base of 1,000,000 users, which SAP will continue to support, but as per the most recent statement of direction, the add-in for Microsoft Excel constitutes the road ahead. As such, there is no roadmap for future AfO development, meaningthat no new AfO capabilities will be developed by SAP. Jeanne clarified that this is why  the collaboration between SAP and APOS regarding AfO scheduling and broadcasting is so important.

AfO Statement of Direction

As mentioned, the add-in for Microsoft Excel is a Cloud product, which means it is fully integrated with SAC and Microsoft’s Office 365. Although the product was initially designed for Office 365, it is also compatible with Office 2021.

SAP Analytics Cloud Add-in for Microsoft Office XLS

Jeanne then went on to describe what new functionality has been delivered recently, including:

  • Support for Live SAP Business Warehouse (SAP BW/Tunnel) and SAP HANA Cloud in Microsoft Excel
  • Member Selector improvements: range
  • Conditional formatting
  • Repository / catalog integration

New connectivity for SAP BW and SAP HANA are great new additions.

As we will see later in the presentation, Repository/catalog integration is key for AfO scheduling and broadcasting.

AfO Recent Deliveries

Jeanne then told us about upcoming feature releases, including:

  • Advanced Flexible reporting – Asymmetric reporting: the new custom function SAP.ASYMMETRICFILTER lets customers build asymmetric reports; for example, a report showing Actual data for Q1 and only Forecast data for Q2 and Q3
  • Planning – Add Comments: customers can insert/retrieve data point comments entered from the web or from Excel.
  • Story Integration – Jump-off from Story: customers can easily jump off from the web to Excel Workbooks without any re-design action needed.

SAP Analytics Cloud Add-in for Microsoft XLS

Jeanne provided useful links for further exploration:

  • SAP Analytics Cloud add in for MS Excel – Community page & blogs & FAQ
  • SAP Analytics Cloud add in for MS Excel – Road Map
  • SAP Analytics Cloud add in for MS Excel –Deploying the add-in
  • SAP Analytics Cloud add in for MS Excel – See it in action!

Jeanne also provided useful links for the SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Office PPT:

  • Video
  • Blog
  • SAP Help
  • Microsoft AppSource
  • Road Map Explorer

Scheduling AfO Reports in SAP Analytics Cloud

The conversation then turned to the topic of scheduling AfO reports in SAP Analytics Cloud. As you may know, SAP Analytics Cloud does not support AfO report scheduling, but APOS and SAP have collaborated to offer AfO report scheduling from SAP Analytics Cloud using the APOS Publisher for Cloud solution. (Available on the SAP Store.)

Allan Pym of APOS asked Jeanne what she had heard from customers about the importance of AfO report scheduling and broadcasting. Jeanne answered that customers say they use scheduling to:

  • Schedule reports that normally take a long time to refresh. The benefit of scheduling is that the reports are ready for use when the user wants to work with them.
  • Automate their auditing. For example, they may schedule a report to refresh every day or every month and they can store them offline to record historical data.
  • Improve load balancing on their system. They schedule reports to refresh during the night when fewer users are on the system.

Allan then delivered an overview of Publisher for Cloud.

APOS Publisher for Cloud - AfO

Allan summarized APOS Publisher for Cloud’s capabilities and benefits:

  • High-volume publications of SAC Stories, SAC Applications, and Analysis for Office reports
    Reach a wide range of information consumers with PDF, XLS, CSV, PPT, DOC formats published to multiple destinations such as email, network file locations, and SFTP/FTP, and schedule pre-processing of Analysis for Office reports.
  • An alternative for SAP BusinessObjects scheduling & broadcasting use cases
    Remove barriers to SAP Analytics Cloud adoption, leverage SAC-based reports in the SAC Repository, and shift AfO scheduling away from BusinessObjects.
  • A path to modernization of BEx Broadcaster use cases
    Adopt Analysis for Office or SAP Analytics Cloud reports to fulfill current BEx reporting objectives, and remove S/4HANA and Datasphere deployment obstacles
  • Centralization and govern of Analysis for Office scheduling
    Monitor, manage and control Analysis for Office scheduling activities, understand and optimize AfO scheduling patterns, and reduce unnecessary scheduling and query activity.
  • The ability to push analytics to casual S/4HANA Users
    Remove information barriers related to casual S/4HANA users with infrequent needs for reports, improving SAP Analytis Cloud adoption, and supporting the broader user community information needs within S/4HANA modernization projects.

APOS Solution Consulting Manager Alan Golding then joined the discussion with a description of the solution’s architecture and use cases showing how it serves Analysis for Office report scheduling and broadcasting needs.

APOS Publisher for Cloud Architecture

Again, you can view the webinar and download the slide deck here, and I recommend doing so if you want to see Alan Golding’s demonstration of the personalization, scheduling, and broadcasting of Analysis for Office reports

APOS will take a deeper dive into this functionality in an upcoming webinar.

Q&A

The presentation ended with a lively Q&A on both the Microsoft Office integration update and the new Analysis for Office scheduling and broadcasting capabilities.

entry.title: Re: FormatConversionBean arrives in CPI!
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

I have successfully deployed the artifact but the conversion seems to be happening implicitly to PDF. I have a Base 64 string (encoded label from FedEx) in ZPLII format and I need to convert it into ZPL. 

Is this possible to do with format conversion bean?
Regards,

Ambrish

entry.title: Released now: Approve employees purchases with IF Design Award winning SAP Ariba Shopping App!
entry.content:
Dear Ariba Community,  

We are pleased to share the exciting news that employee shopping has become even more efficient with the launch of SAP Ariba Shopping version 1.12.0. In addition to this milestone, we are honored to announce that we have received the IF Design Award 2024 for our innovative and seamless buyer shopping experience!

With the latest release, users can now leverage the entire purchasing process through their mobile devices, from initiating the purchase request to receiving the goods at their designated location, using SAP Ariba Buying or SAP Ariba Buying, with guided buying capabilities. 

Let's take a closer look at how this workflow benefits an employee – let us take Colby from the latest YouTube video as an example - looking to order office equipment, such as a new phone. Whether utilizing SAP Ariba Buying or SAP Ariba Buying, with guided buying capabilities, Colby can easily start shopping by browsing through a selection of company catalogs within the app. Furthermore, company catalogs provide valuable supplementary information, including details on sustainability or even an augmented reality view of the items, if provided by the catalog provider. Additionally, with the upcoming Ariba release 2411, Colby will have access to Level 1 punchout catalogs, significantly expanding the range of available products for mobile shopping.

Once Colby has added the chosen items to his shopping cart and reviewed his selection, he can submit a purchase requisition to initiate the approval process within Ariba Buying. Based on the configured approval workflow, Colby's manager will receive an approval notification. This notification can be previewed on the manager's phone, and can be easily accessed with a single tab to proceed to the approval screen within the SAP Ariba Shopping app. From there, the manager can approve the purchase requisition, signaling the green light for the delivery of the requested items to the employee.  

We encourage you to explore the approval workflow within the demo mode of the SAP Ariba Shopping app. Should you wish to test the approval functionality with your Ariba system, please read this blog post or the onboarding guide at the SAP help documentation to get started with SAP Ariba Shopping. You find more details how to setup Ariba user mobile approver roles at this help page.

Please note that the approval functionality is still available within the SAP Ariba Procurement app. For a comprehensive comparison of the two apps, we recommend reading our new blog post.

Enjoy shopping!

 

Michael Spiess

SAP Ariba Product Management 

 

Further References:

  • New blog post about app comparison between SAP Ariba Shopping and SAP Ariba Procurement app
  • Download (iOS/Android) SAP Ariba Shopping app 
  • Watch SAP Ariba Shopping App on Youtube
  • Our roadmaps for iOS and Android.
  • Blog post: Gettings started with SAP Ariba Shopping App in 7 steps

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
entry.content: I like the industrial flair of the setup, however I've never imagined an Apple users workplace would look like this 😂

entry.title: How to create build for Integration Suite Artifact with downloaded artifact zip
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am looking for a way to generate mtar for download artifact(in this case Integration Flow) zip using mbt build/assemble.

The idea is to use Accelerator Hub API(https://api.sap.com/api/IntegrationContent/path/get_IntegrationDesigntimeArtifacts_Id___Id___Version___Version_____value ) to download integration artifact, generate mtar and upload the same to cTMS. 

I am able to successfully conduct this exercise with Integration Suite Package as package is exported with expected files(artifact content, contentmetdata.md, hash, resources.cnt), but this is not the case when we download individual artifacts.

Now I know that I can directly use "Transport" functionality in cTMS. But we wish to take the build through our CI/CD tool.

I have checked project piper documentation, but they also can only do the mtar for entire package.

Also, we do not wish to directly upload artifacts with accelerator hub API.

 

Any suggestion is highly appreciated.

Muchas gracias.

Best regards,

Robson

entry.title: How do I generate a report of the notes that are added to items and projects in SAP PPM
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I would like you to help me by telling me if there is a table or report for SAP PPM, in which I can generate the notes added to the project in the documents and notes tab.

Thank you very much

entry.title: Re: Using SAP Signavio Process governance with Service no...
entry.content:
Hi Manuel,

Thank you for your response.

We aim to streamline and automate the management of Dictionary items in Signavio Process Manager. When a user requests to add or modify a dictionary item, they would submit a form on Process Governance, triggering an incident in ServiceNow via API. The ticket is assigned to a Dictionary Manager responsible for adding, modifying, or rejecting the request, which should update the original case in Process Governance and, if feasible, automatically update dictionary entries.

entry.title: User Management with FUE
entry.content:
Hi all,

The FUE (Full Use Equivalent) is a concept that came to change the game in terms of licensing administration within S/4HANA Cloud. There are very helpful articles that define many aspects about FUE.

However, there are companies not large enough to sustain a numerous amount of FUEs, while having an important number of support users that maintain their systems.

As Security experts, what actions are you recommending to reduce the number of Advanced users but keeping ongoing support? Are shared users for support teams becoming acceptable when a customer cannot afford all the FUEs for a specific team?

Let me know your thoughts. Have a great day ahead!

entry.title: Stop Rumours about Adobe LiveCycle Designer (ALD)
entry.content:
TRUE: Adobe has discontinued core technical support for Adobe’s own LiveCycle Designer as of March 2018.

ABSOLUTELY TRUE: With SAP there is NO end-of-life for SAP’s LiveCycle Designer (Adobe LiveCycle Designer for SAP solutions). It continues to be supported and there are a couple of notes about it that you can always consult. One useful note is: 2187332. There’s also a note about the maintenance strategy of the Designer: 2763928.

ALSO TRUE: Adobe LiveCycle Designer for SAP solutions (ALD) is not to be confused with Adobe’s own LiveCycle Designer which is from Adobe and costs money. Our customers who use forms by Adobe only need SAP’s ALD and it is free-of-charge.

The current version is ADOBE LIVECYCLE DESIGNER for SAP solutions 11.0.

Adobe LiveCycle Designer for SAP Solutions

DOWNLOAD: SAP customers can download ALD from the SAP Support Portal. See the documentation in the Online Help

Download: SAP for Me

entry.title: Where shall an administrator start learning how to managing and maintaining the SAP BTP platform?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Administrating SAP Business Technology Platform learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey teaches administrators how to set up and configure the SAP BTP, set up services and environments, manage users and authorizations, understand the observability strategy, and review the cost and consumption of your BTP accounts.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, you will understand how to set up and configure the SAP BTP, set up services and environments, manage users and authorizations, understand the observability strategy, and review the cost and consumption of BTP accounts.

Prerequisites

  • Discovering SAP Business Technology Platform

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Using SAP Signavio Process governance with Service no...
entry.content: Hi Manuel, Thank you for your response. We aim to streamline and automate the management of Dictionary items in Signavio Process Manager. When a user requests to add or modify a dictionary item, they would submit a form on Process Governance, triggering an incident in ServiceNow via API. The ticket is assigned to a Dictionary Manager responsible for adding, modifying, or rejecting the request, which should update the original case in Process Governance and, if feasible, automatically update dictionary entries.

I have prepared the delivery for kitting process and completed all config as well. Urgent help needed.

entry.title: Re: SAP PS latest tcode for obsolete T codes
entry.content:
Most of the standard PS transactions have not been replaced by Fiori Apps, they will still work in Fiori.  Use the Fiori Apps Library to see what's new.

https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/

entry.title: Re: Error in creation material master MM01
entry.content:
Hello @Saurabh_2804 

Check if the note 3237701 - Internal error in FORM/FUNCTION CKMS_PERIOD_POST_DELTA helps.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: 🟢 Tools for Clean ABAP
entry.content:
How does the ABAP Cleaner influence or incorporate with good old formatters like Pretty Printer or the Formatter of Eclipse?
My team consists of old ABAP developers who still develop in SE80 and even older transactions as it was used at 4.6c. Some of them stopped learning 15 years ago but are still doing development stuff.

Am I'm right in saying that once I used ABAP cleaner, Pretty Printer might undo changes, especially indentations?

entry.title: Re: Flexible Workflow Steps and Approval Logic
entry.content:
Hey,

please check how to create approvers via this link: Creating Approvers | SAP Help Portal

Kind regards,

Bart

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: @VijayBhaskarReddyGurrala welcome. Please join the SAP TechEd - SAP Community to share your thoughts. There are Asia Pacific | Location-Based Groups | SAP Community to join too, among many others! Best of luck.

entry.title: Re: Building a docker image of a cds-dk app on a Raspberr...
entry.content: Turned out that building the docker image from the Dockerfile on the RaspberryPi caused the problem. Building it on another machine as a multi-platform docker image, uploding it to a registry, then pulling it onto the Raspberry worked fine. I guess it's more a Docker issue than a @CDS-dk issue

entry.title: Re: Error in creation material master MM01
entry.content:
Hello @DominikTylczyn 

Unable to open the above link. Please guide.

Regards,

Saurabh

Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Istanbul 2024
entry.content:
This weekend, we had an incredible time with the local community at SAP Inside Track Istanbul 2024! 🚀 It was a full day packed with engaging talks, insightful discussions, and plenty of networking with some of the brightest minds in the SAP ecosystem. We explored innovations across topics like CDS, AMDP, GenAI, Integration Suite, BTP, and more. From deep dives into SAP technologies to conversations on best practices and real-world use cases, we covered a broad spectrum of knowledge and insights.

This year was my first time being involved in organizing SAP Inside Track, and I was so happy to be part of the team bringing it to life! Seeing all the hard work come together and the community’s positive response was truly rewarding.

I want to extend my heartfelt thanks to all our fantastic speakers, who delivered high-quality presentations and shared their expertise. Your contributions were invaluable in making this event both educational and inspiring. 🙏

A massive shoutout to our attendees, who brought an incredible energy that kept the event dynamic and engaging throughout the day. It was wonderful to see so many passionate individuals come together to learn, share, and grow as a community. 

Of course, this event wouldn’t have been possible without the generous support of our sponsor, NTT, who ensured everything ran smoothly. A big thank you as well to SAP Press and Espresso Tutorials for their ongoing support. They’ve always been there for us, providing books and platform access to help our community thrive.

Lastly, we’re already looking forward to coming together again next May for even more knowledge-sharing and innovation! Until then, let’s keep the momentum going and continue to strengthen our incredible local community.

Stay tuned for more update.. I can’t wait for the next SAP Inside Track!

entry.title: Re: Signavio Process Excel Reports - How to See Sequentia...
entry.content:
The report recommended would be the Process Characteristics report with element details.  It is recommended to create one report to see if suits your business scenario. Or you can design Process Documentation with some visualized model as an image as well. If you have more specific questions, please guide create a support case via the link here:  SAP for Me (log in with S-User ID and password).

Kind regards,

Kantrice D

entry.title: Re: Error in creation material master MM01
entry.content:
Hello @DominikTylczyn 

The link is showing No data avaialbale please guide how to access that.

Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: Re: Purchasing a discounted certification attempt

I’m excited to continue expanding my SAP skills! I’ve completed learning journeys , now looking to further enhance my knowledge.

As I plan to pursue certification, I would greatly appreciate any support, such as a voucher, to assist with this next step. Additionally, I’m curious if there’s a platform where fellow learners and professionals connect? Any guidance on certifications and learning paths would be wonderful as I aim to contribute more to the SAP community and my organization.

entry.title: SAP Android SDK - offline odata - batch CUD operations
entry.content:
Hi experts,

i'm currently using the v24.8.0 of  SAP BTP SDK for Android  with with offline odata

But I can't figure it out how to batch my CUD operations. In the last versions of the SDK, I was using the class OfflineODataRequestOptions and his TransactionId to group them. But now, it doesn't seem to work. 

Is someone knows how to handle this situation ?

Thanks a lot

Yohann

 

OData #offline odata

SAP Mobile Services

entry.title: Re: Purchasing a discounted certification attempt
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I am a recent Software Engineering graduate, eager to expand my expertise in SAP, with a particular focus on becoming an SAP Certified Associate - Data Analyst in SAP Analytics Cloud.

Having successfully completed the learning journeys for "Designing Stories in SAP Analytics Cloud" and "Leveraging SAP Analytics Cloud Functionality for Enterprise Planning," I am now seeking to further enhance my skills and knowledge.

As a gesture of support for this next step, I kindly request a voucher to assist with the certification process. This would not only alleviate financial constraints but also motivate me to continue advancing in this field. I am confident that this will enable me to contribute meaningfully to the SAP community.

Thank you for considering my request, and I look forward to your positive response.

Sincerely,
Eisha Anwar

entry.title: Re: Developing for Analytics with the SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hi @AndreasRiehl,

thank you for the excellent videos and posts about the embedded analytics – makes it easier for people who have just explored the transactional RAP-world to find an entry.

I do have a question concerning the on-stack possibilities on a public-cloud system. When creating a transient view entity as CDS-projection, we can expose it to create an InA-service. I got that this service cannot be consumed by fiori-elements and the preferred way probably is the SAC but i do get an excellent preview which could basically serve as an app without having the need to involve the SAC at all.

Is it possible somehow to create a tile that works like the CDS-projection-preview and i'm just missing it?

Kind regards

Mario Lenz

entry.title: Re: Do we have the relevant S4 HANA standard V2/V4 API for the BAPI "BAPI_ACC_ACTIVITY_ALLOC_PO
entry.content:
From my point of view this one should do the same:
https://api.sap.com/api/OP_DIRECTACTIVITYALLOCATION_0001/overview

entry.title: Re: SAP BUILD PROCESS AUTOMATION GETTING ERROR 500 IN RBSC PORTAL FOR AGENT UPDATE
entry.content:
Hi Rahul,

I wanted to follow up on the issue you were experiencing with the Desktop Agent Update. Have you been able to resolve it since clicking the Agent Update button?

If you're still encountering problems, please double-check the following steps:

  1. Create a technical user: After clicking the Agent Update button, you should be redirected to the RSBC portal. Click "Add User," enter a name for the technical user, and select "Add User."
  2. Generate a secret ID: Go to the "Users" panel, choose the technical user you created, navigate to the "Strong Cryptography Authentication" section, and select "Generate." Copy the generated secret ID.
  3. Enter credentials: In the Agent Update page, enter the technical user name and the secret ID you copied.
  4. Install Desktop Agent: If you're using an RPA tenant, go to Cloud Factory, select "Configuration," and then "Agent Update." If you're using an SPA tenant, go to "Settings" and then "Agent Update." Choose "Enter Secret ID," enter your technical name, paste the secret ID, and select "Confirm." You can now install Desktop Agent 3 or copy the download link for other users.

If you're still experiencing issues after following these steps, please let me know and we can try to troubleshoot further.

entry.title: Re: SAP PS latest tcode for obsolete T codes
entry.content: Hi thanks for reply. Just wanted to know how can i find sap app corresponding to, lets say CJI3N from Fiori library?

entry.title: Why is my Fiori application no longer working when started from the launchpad (FPS1)?
entry.content:
After upgrading to FPS1, my Fiori application is no longer working, when it is started from the launchpad. Starting it by using its full URL is working fine, but when I run it from the launchpad I get these errors:

Uncaught (in promise) TypeError: this.getRouter().initMaster is not a function
Uncaught (in promise) TypeError: this.getOwnerComponent() is undefined

 I don't get any of them on older system or when the application is hosted on the BTP.

Here is the part of the source code where the errors occur. I can post more if required:


], function (UIComponent, Device, JSONModel, /* ... */) {
"use strict";

/* ... */
return UIComponent.extend("xxx.xxx.Component", {
/* ... */
init: function () {
var mConfig = this.getMetadata().getConfig();

var oParameters = this.getComponentData().startupParameters;
var aUrlParametersForEveryRequest = ["sap-server", "sap-client", "sap-language"];

for (var parameter in oParameters) {
aUrlParametersForEveryRequest.push(parameter);
}

// Create and set the ODataModel
var oModel = models.createODataModel({
urlParametersForEveryRequest: aUrlParametersForEveryRequest,
url: this.getMetadata().getConfig().urlPrefix + this.getMetadata().getConfig().serviceUrl,
config: {
metadataUrlParams: {
"sap-documentation": "heading"
}
},
startUpParams: this.getComponentData().startupParameters
});
this.setModel(oModel);
this._createMetadataPromise(oModel);

// Set the i18n model
this.setModel(models.createResourceModel(mConfig.i18nBundle), "i18n");

// Set the device model
this.setModel(models.createDeviceModel(this.geMode()), "device");

// Set the FLP model
//this.setModel(models.createFLPModel(), "FLP");

// Initialize the error handler with the component
this._oErrorHandler = new ErrorHandler(this);

// Call the base component's init function
UIComponent.prototype.init.apply(this, arguments);

/* ... */

// Create the views based on the url/hash
models.setRouter(this.getRouter());
this.getRouter().initMaster();

What changes do I have to make, so that this application will run on FPS1 system while still being compatible to older systems?
